creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
A more recent version is needed to better match documentation and
examples at flexget.com and not depend on FreeBSD mirrors for distfiles.

Fix: I have no clue in what order dependencies should be sorted !
How-To-Repeat: # distfile for 21-Aug-2011 snapshot is not provided by upstream anymore
$ make fetch MASTER_SITE_BACKUP=
===>  License MIT accepted by the user
===>   py27-flexget-1.0r2315_2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> FlexGet-1.0r2315.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://download.flexget.com/unstable/FlexGet-1.0r2315.tar.gz
fetch: http://download.flexget.com/unstable/FlexGet-1.0r2315.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1

# for users updating from r2315 the first run may include...
$ flexget
